name: codex-harness
description: Autonomous Codex-native issue-to-verified-commit harness with durable tasks and adversarial multi-agent review.

interface.longDescription: Runs Codex through durable planning, GitHub issue tracking, feature commits, evidence gates, independent verification, and adversarial multi-agent review while minimizing user interruptions.
defaultPrompt: Finish this feature autonomously and prove it is complete.
